methodology: trades with ribbon_flip in triggers_fired vs without. ribbon_flip means the ribbon JUST changed direction at entry bar.
findings: IS: ribbon_flip stops 86% (bad), no-flip stops 64% (better). IS ribbon_flip WR=13.8 vs 32.5.
OOS: ribbon_flip stops 43% (GOOD), no-flip stops 64%. OOS ribbon_flip WR=57.1 vs 36.4.
CANNOT GATE: blocking ribbon_flip gives IS_delta=-2793 (L155 fail). Net IS P&L positive.
C22 root: trending IS (bull 2025) = ribbon flip is false signal (reversal). Volatile OOS = ribbon flip is momentum entry.
FUTURE: regime-conditional sizing bonus for ribbon_flip on volatile VIX days. Deferred to VIX-regime classifier.
